steps.title: Use slope intercept form
steps.content:
A line with slope $m$ has equation $y=mx+b$. Here the slope is
$$m=-\frac{1}{3}$$
so the equation must have the form
$$y=-\frac{x}{3}+b$$

steps.title: Find the intercept
steps.content: Substitute the point $(9,5)$. $$5=-\frac{9}{3}+b$$ $$5=-3+b$$ $$8=b$$ So the equation is $y=-\frac{x}{3}+8$. The answer is D.
